segments.text: Thus the Lord Yahweh showed me: behold, he formed locusts in the beginning of the shooting up of the latter growth; and behold, it was the latter growth after the king’s harvest.
When they finished eating the grass of the land, then I said,
Lord Yahweh, forgive, I beg you! How could Jacob st and? For he is small.
segments.speaker: Amos

segments.text: Yahweh relented concerning this.
It shall not be,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.
Thus the Lord Yahweh showed me: behold, the Lord Yahweh called for judgment by fire; and it dried up the great deep, and would have devoured the land.
Then I said,
Lord Yahweh, stop, I beg you! How could Jacob st and? For he is small.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Yahweh relented concerning this.
This also shall not be,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: says the Lord Yahweh.
Thus he showed me: behold, the Lord stood beside a wall made by a plumb line, with a plumb line in his hand.
Yahweh said to me,
Amos, what do you see?
segments.speaker: Amos

segments.text: I said,
A plumb line.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Then the Lord said,
Behold, I will set a plumb line in the middle of my people Israel. I will not again pass by them any more.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: The high places of Isaac will be desolate, the sanctuaries of Israel will be laid waste; and I will rise against the house of Jeroboam with the sword.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Then Amaziah the priest of Bethel sent to Jeroboam king of Israel, saying,
Amos has conspired against you in the middle of the house of Israel. The land is not able to bear all his words.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: For Amos says, ‘Jeroboam will die by the sword, and Israel shall surely be led away captive out of his land.’
segments.speaker: Amos

segments.text: Amaziah also said to Amos,
You seer, go, flee away into the land of Judah, and there eat bread, and prophesy there,
segments.speaker: Amaziah also

segments.text: but don’t prophesy again any more at Bethel; for it is the king’s sanctuary, and it is a royal house!
segments.speaker: Amaziah

segments.text: Then Amos answered Amaziah,
I was no prophet, neither was I a prophet’s son, but I was a herdsman, and a farmer of sycamore figs;
segments.speaker: Amos

segments.text: and Yahweh took me from following the flock, and Yahweh said to me, ‘Go, prophesy to my people Israel.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Now therefore listen to Yahweh’s word: ‘You say, Don’t prophesy against Israel, and don’t preach against the house of Isaac.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Therefore Yahweh says: ‘Your wife shall be a prostitute in the city, and your sons and your daughters shall fall by the sword, and your land shall be divided by line; and you yourself shall die in a land that is unclean, and Israel shall surely be led away captive out of his land.’
segments.speaker: The LORD
